meta.title: Windsurf Tarragona · Nautical School & Water Activities in Playa Larga
meta.description: Nautical school and water sports center in Playa Larga, Tarragona. Windsurf, sailing, surfing, catamaran and Catalan boat courses. Banana boat, kayak, boat rides. +20 years on the Costa Dorada.

hero.sub1: Windsurf · Sailing · Surf · Catamaran · Catalan Boat

banana.desc: The most fun experience in the Mediterranean. Hold on tight, laugh non-stop and create memories that last a lifetime.

windsurf.name: Windsurf
windsurf.desc: The classic. You, a board and the wind. Master your balance and sail with total freedom.

vela.name: Sailing
vela.desc: Learn sailing techniques. Strategy, wind and the sea as your teacher.

surf.name: Surf
surf.desc: Ride the Mediterranean waves. Classes for all levels at Playa Larga.

wakesurf.name: Wakesurf
wakesurf.desc: Surf the wave generated by our boat. No rope. The most addictive feeling on water.

catamaran.name: Catamaran
catamaran.desc: Sail a light catamaran. Speed, teamwork and adrenaline.

patin-catalan.name: Catalan Boat
patin-catalan.desc: The traditional boat of our coast. Unique in the world, pure Mediterranean identity.

team-building.title: Team Building
team-building.desc: Strengthen your team with the challenge of the sea

amigos.title: Friends
amigos.desc: Custom nautical adventure for your group

despedidas.title: Hen & Stag Parties
despedidas.desc: The most different and memorable party

items.text: I did the windsurf course in August and it was INCREDIBLE. The instructors are super patient and professional. We're coming back for sure!
items.name: María G.

items.text: We took the kids banana boating and kayaking. They had a BLAST. Perfect organization and Playa Larga is spectacular.
items.name: Jordi P.

items.text: Fantastic windsurfing school. Professional instructors, great equipment, beautiful location. Can't recommend it enough!
items.name: Sophie M.

items.text: The perfect hen party! Banana boat, kayak and boat ride. Guaranteed laughs. We'll be back!
items.name: Laura R.

contacto.subtitle: Come to Playa Larga. We're waiting for you.
contacto.mapAddress: Ctra. N-340, Km 1168 · Camping Las Palmeras
